package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Probation : ₹20,000 per month Salary after 6 months Probation : CTC 5 LPA
package_salary.bond: • Service Commitment: 12 months minimum • Candidate shall not resign before 12 months from the date of execution of the MoU • Bond Amount: ₹1,00,000/- (Rupees One Lakh only) payable in case of premature termination • Security: Post-dated/undated cheque of ₹1,00,000/- • Candidates can also deposit 10th Marksheet instead of cheque.
